issues.description: ReturnToHand is incorrect. Card effect states 'Add up to 1 of your opponent's Characters... to the top or bottom of your opponent's Life cards face-up.' This is a move to Life cards, not returning to hand. Correct action should be custom/specialized for Life card placement, or if system supports it, a move-to-life action. ReturnToHand violates the core mechanic.

Missing condition that this action is conditional on the first action succeeding ('You may play 1 [Kotori]...: Add...'). The colon indicates the Add effect only triggers if a Kotori was played. Current DSL treats both actions as independent.
PlayFromHand should have a 'maxCount' or similar constraint of 1. Filter correctly identifies Kotori but lacks quantity limit specification in action parameters.
